title: Redstone-chan Chemical Elements
description: About Added 118 chemical elements and their derivative items to the game.
body:
Added 118 chemical elements and their derivative items to the game. Items have no default acquisition methods and only basic crafting recipes are provided. This is intended for modpack creators to customize and use.

为游戏添加了118种化学元素及其衍生物品。 物品没有获取方式，只有基础的合成。 是给整合包作者魔改使用的
